evals.prompt: I need ad creatives for Aloha protein bars. Their site is aloha.com. I want to use Nano Banana Studio. Give me 5 ad prompts — pick the best formats for a protein bar brand.
evals.expected_output: Should produce a Brand DNA document for Aloha, recommend 5 suitable ad formats, and output a JSON array ready to paste into Nano Banana Studio bulk import. Each prompt should reference Aloha's specific brand colors, typography, and product details.

evals.prompt: make ads for gymshark, gymshark.com. I'll use higsfield. just do templates 7, 21, and 40 please
evals.expected_output: Should research Gymshark's brand, then generate 3 specific ad prompts (Us vs Them #7, Bold Statement #21, Post-It Note #40) as plain text numbered sections. Each prompt should be filled with Gymshark-specific details — their black/grey/shark blue colors, athletic imagery, competitive positioning against other gym wear.

evals.prompt: I want to create some Facebook ad images for my coffee brand Grind. Website is grfrnd.com. Can you make me a batch of ad prompts I can generate? I'll be using nano banana studio
evals.expected_output: Should ask which output format (and accept Nano Banana Studio from the prompt), research Grind coffee's brand identity, present template categories for selection or recommend suitable ones for a coffee brand, then output a JSON array with prompts filled with Grind-specific details. Should include the brand's actual colors, packaging style, and tone.
